title: ROPE validation check kind: satellite_lineout
description: Fields of a check object (besides id/kind) when kind == 'satellite_lineout'. Forecasts [start, end], produces a trace plot (model output vs. satellite-measured values along a track) and a scalar RMSE-along-track. satellite_track_csv is a plain path (relative to the suite JSON's own directory) — its own truth-data reference, independent of any other kind's convention.

satellite_track_csv.description: Path to a CSV with datetime,lst,lat,alt_km,density[,uncertainty] columns along a satellite's track, relative to the suite JSON's directory.

threshold.description: Optional pass/fail bound(s) on the computed RMSE-along-track. Evaluated by the check function itself, not by this schema.
